name: Unhandled Intent Reconciler
description: Reads the unhandled-intent registry (unrouted + unrecognized) and writes proposal stubs. Invokes reasoning:analyze to suggest routing entries (for unrouted) or new intent definitions (for unrecognized).

params.instruction: Review each .proposal.json in active/shared/tmp/unhandled-intent-proposals/. For 'unrouted' proposals: look up the intent_id in knowledge/product/governance/standard-intents.json to understand what it does, then look at the existing entries in knowledge/product/governance/intent-routing-map.json and scan pipelines/ for a matching pipeline filename. Suggest the pipeline_intent_map or mission_intent_action_map entry value. For 'unrecognized' proposals: examine the utterance_samples to understand what capability the user wanted. Suggest either (a) a new intent definition to add to standard-intents.json or (b) the id of an existing intent whose surface_examples/trigger_keywords should be extended. Output a JSON array of {miss_type, intent_id_or_sample, recommendation} for each proposal.

params.message: [UNHANDLED-INTENT] Suggestions written to active/shared/tmp/unhandled-intent-review.json. Review and apply to intent-routing-map.json or standard-intents.json.
[UNHANDLED-INTENT] No unhandled intents found. Registry is clean.
